issues.description: First ability trigger should be 'Activated' with condition 'OncePerTurn', not just 'Activated'

First action should activate (set up) player's own DON!! card, not give DON. Action type 'GiveDon' is incorrect; should be 'GiveKeyword' or similar for 'set up' (activate). Card text says 'Set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active'
Second action should target 'your DON!! cards OR opponent's Characters with cost ≤4', not just opponent characters. Must support DON!! cards as valid targets

Missing second effect entirely: '[End of Your Turn] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: Set up to 1 of your {FILM} type Characters as active' — requires trigger 'EndOfTurn', condition on resting own DON!!, and action to set up FILM character
